'''apafath''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fall|fall]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ?-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fall|fall]]
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thi?apaf || ji?apaf || shi?apaf || ki?apaf
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthu?apaf || juju?apaf || shushu?apaf || kuku?apaf
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thu?apaf || ju?apaf || shu?apaf || ku?apaf
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thu?apaf || ju?apaf || shu?apaf || ku?apaf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || the?apaf || je?apaf || she?apaf || ke?apaf
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thotho?apaf || jojo?apaf || shosho?apaf || koko?apaf
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tho?apaf || jo?apaf || sho?apaf || ko?apaf
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tho?apaf || jo?apaf || sho?apaf || ko?apaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ?apaf || ?apaf || ?apaf || ?apaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ?apaf || ?apaf || ?apaf || ?apaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ?apaf || ?apaf || ?apaf || ?apaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ?apaf || ?apaf || ?apaf || ?apaf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæ?apaf || jæ?apaf || shæ?apaf || kæ?apaf
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thatha?apaf || jaja?apaf || shasha?apaf || kaka?apaf
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tha?apaf || ja?apaf || sha?apaf || ka?apaf
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tha?apaf || ja?apaf || sha?apaf || ka?apaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || sha?apaf
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || gosha?apaf
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokisha?apaf
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || sha?apafnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gosha?apafnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokisha?apafnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || sha?apafshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gosha?apafnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokisha?apafshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || sha?apafro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gosha?apafnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokisha?apafro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || sha?apafmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gosha?apafnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokisha?apafmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || sha?apafsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gosha?apafnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokisha?apafsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || sha?apafng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gosha?apafnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokisha?apafng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || sha?apafya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gosha?apafnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokisha?apafya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || sha?apafyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gosha?apafnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokisha?apafyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || sha?apafnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gosha?apafnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokisha?apafnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || sha?apafnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gosha?apafnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisha?apafnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || sha?apafnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gosha?apafnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokisha?apafnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || sha?apafshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gosha?apafnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokisha?apafshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || sha?apafshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gosha?apafnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisha?apafshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || sha?apafshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gosha?apafnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokisha?apafshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || sha?apafronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gosha?apafnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokisha?apafronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || sha?apafroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gosha?apafnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokisha?apafroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || sha?apafromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gosha?apafnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokisha?apafromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || sha?apafmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gosha?apafnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokisha?apafmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || sha?apafmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gosha?apafnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokisha?apafmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || sha?apafmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gosha?apafnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisha?apafmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|66ca423}}
